calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Jan-13-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for OSC hearing for Name Change.
Dept. 514, Judge: Harry M. Dorfman, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Mitch Lyon, #6840
Petitioner Ruby Guzman Escalona; mother of minor present in court.
Petitioner sworn and examined through Spanish Interpreter Marvin Samayoa.
Proof of Publication on file.
Order waiving the requirement of further Notice to other parent for minor: Maedzi Laura Guzman- Escalona.
Other parent for minor Yaredzy Zuleika Guzman-Escalona is deceased.
No objections to the proposed change of names were made at the hearing. It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct and sufficient, and the petition should be granted.
The court grants the petition for Change of Name of minor Yredzi Zuleika Guzman-Escalona to Zuleika Yaredz Pacheco-Guzman, and name change of minor Maedzi Laura Guzman-Escalona to Maedzi Serena Perez-Guzman.
Decree Changing Names signed in open court.
